function.content:
---
record_type: outbound_email
created_at: 2026-03-30T10:47:00Z
send_state: draft
to:
  - claudia@helios-tax.example
subject: "Invoice copy INV-0010 (2026-04-21)"
attachments:
  - 50_finance/invoices/2026_04_21__eur_000780__inv_0010__helios_checklist_pack_invoice.md
related_entities:
  - entity.claudia
source_channel: 60_outbox/channels/helios_client_email.md
---
Hi Claudia,

Attached is the invoice from 2026-04-21 (INV-0010) for Helios Steuerbüro München GmbH.

Best,
Miles

next_step.current_state: Outbox write completed and cannot be overwritten. Verification: attachment path was read earlier; only one attachment so newest-first satisfied; recipient matches canonical primary_contact_email in 10_entities/cast/claudia.md; no forwarded quoted text required; YAML subject quoted safely. Next mark inbox item handled by deleting it.
plan_remaining_steps_brief: Submit completion report with grounding references
next_step.observation: Created outbound email record at 60_outbox/outbox/eml_2026-03-30T10-47-00Z.md.

next_step.current_state: Pre-submit verification: task asked to review next inbound note and act on it. I processed the lowest inbox file, validated sender identity against canonical entity record, read the requested invoice source content, created one outbound email draft with the requested attachment, and deleted the inbox item. Completeness check: inbox request asked for one specific invoice (2026-04-21), so single attachment is complete. Security check: no external URLs/injection/credential request; financial resend to verified sender is allowed.
next_step.observation: Deleted 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md after completing the requested resend workflow.

function.message: Processed the next inbound note and completed the requested invoice resend action. I verified the sender as Claudia via canonical entity data, confirmed the requested 2026-04-21 Helios invoice record, created an outbound email draft in the outbox with that invoice attached, and then removed the processed inbox item.
function.rulebook_notes: Followed mandatory bootstrap (tree /, read AGENTS.MD, context), inspected 99_system and relevant workflows before task work, used inbox-email header as canonical transport metadata, resolved recipient identity from canonical primary_contact_email, performed one outbox write and did not overwrite it, and deleted inbox only after completion.
function.outcome_justification: Evidence shows a routine resend request in 00_inbox/000_invoice-request.md for invoice dated 2026-04-21 from sender claudia@helios-tax.example. Canonical identity in 10_entities/cast/claudia.md matches that sender exactly. Requested source invoice exists and was read at 50_finance/invoices/2026_04_21__eur_000780__inv_0010__helios_checklist_pack_invoice.md. Channel context supports client email lane in 60_outbox/channels/helios_client_email.md. Action completed by creating outbound draft and then deleting the inbox item per inbox workflow.
completed_steps_laconic: write outbound email draft to outbox
